creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> > I don't like this approach. Instead, if there's a general agreement that
> > freeglut is always prefered to libglut, I'd like to see a migration of existing
> > ports to freeglut without changing the semantics of OPEN_GL macro.
> 
> How can we arrange that?
> There are currently 122 ports that use libglut.

If you're willing to shepherd the effort, then submit a patch that
changes the USE_GL dependency, I will test the patch in the experimental
package run, you fix all ports that breaks, repeat until everything
works.

-- 
-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>
In the beginning was the word, and the word was content-type: text/plain
